name: Betty's Apple Crumb Pie
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 375°F.
Peel, core, and slice the apples. Place them in a large bowl. Add the sugar, cinnamon, and tapioca. Stir until the apples are well coated.
Spoon the apple mixture into the pre-baked pie shell. Dot with butter or margarine. Set aside.
For the crumb topping, mix flour, ground cinnamon, and brown sugar in a bowl. Cut in the butter until it resembles coarse cornmeal. Sprinkle over the apples.
Bake for 40 to 45 minutes.
